name: TorchGeo
desc: PyTorch domain library providing datasets, samplers, and pre-trained models for geospatial data

name: GDAL
desc: Translator library for raster and vector geospatial data formats

name: Rasterio
desc: Pythonic interface for reading/writing geospatial raster data based on GDAL

name: Google Earth Engine
desc: Cloud platform for planetary-scale geospatial analysis with petabytes of satellite imagery

name: eo-learn
desc: Earth observation processing framework built around Sentinel Hub services

name: MMRotate
desc: OpenMMLab toolbox for oriented object detection in aerial images
